notes_for_human_reviewer: NETWORKER FAILURE MODE — the transactional/strategic operator, the over-rotation this lesson warns against. Every relationship is framed as ROI ('worth keeping warm... could be a referrer', 'directors hire; worth the investment', a 'running list of contacts by usefulness'). sincerity_not_performance FLOORS at 1 (the chapter's exact anti-pattern: cultivating the useful). It also self-credits Sam's work ('the PC team I lead... I developed Sam') — caps four_qualities and step_forward. And it CAPITULATES to the toxic peer for advantage ('having Victor onside is more useful... put in the good word') — boundary_with_toxic FLOORS at 1. Tests whether the grader catches that competent, strategic-sounding relationship-management is the failure when it's transactional and vouches for a toxic actor. Soft dims pre-set {2, tol 2}; the two floors hold it off pass.
